specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running, Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We work with boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters, bringing hands-on expertise and a genuine commitment to quality marine craftsmanship to every job we take on.

Our team handles a comprehensive range of specialized marine services, including professional boat surveying and inspection, diving and underwater services, marine AC and climate control systems, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey before buying a vessel, an underwater hull inspection, a cooling system overhaul, or a complete sanitation system refit, we have the skills and equipment to get it done right. We understand that each of these systems plays a critical role in the safety, comfort, and reliability of your boat.

At Ben's Boatworks, we know your boat represents a significant investment — and we treat it that way. We serve recreational boaters, liveaboards, and working vessel owners throughout South Florida, including communities along the Chesapeake Bay corridor and Annapolis waterfront. Our approach is straightforward: show up, do the work properly, and make sure you feel confident in your vessel before we leave the dock. We have built our reputation one satisfied boat owner at a time, and that is something we take seriously.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, underwater diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks conducts thorough boat surveys and inspections to assess the structural integrity, mechanical condition, and overall safety of your vessel. Whether you are preparing for a purchase, refinancing, or insurance requirement, a professional marine survey gives you a clear, documented picture of exactly what you are working with.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services cover hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, line and debris removal, and other below-the-waterline work that keeps your vessel performing safely. Staying on top of underwater maintenance helps prevent costly damage and keeps your running gear in solid shape between haul-outs.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: We install, service, and repair marine air conditioning and climate control systems, ensuring your onboard environment stays comfortable in warm weather conditions. From routine maintenance and refrigerant checks to full system replacements, we work with a range of marine HVAC equipment to keep things running efficiently.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Ben's Boatworks handles marine plumbing and sanitation system work including through-hull fittings, holding tanks, bilge systems, freshwater systems, and MSD installations. Properly functioning sanitation and plumbing systems are essential for both comfort and compliance with marine environmental regulations.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection report
Underwater hull inspection and zinc anode replacement
Marine air conditioning system repair and seasonal servicing
Holding tank installation and sanitation system overhaul
Propeller removal and running gear inspection via diving
Freshwater plumbing refit and through-hull fitting replacement
Insurance or lender-required vessel survey and documentation
